meta.title: Compare Keeply — Alternatives to Dropbox, Time Machine, Snowtrack and more
meta.description: How does Keeply compare to Dropbox version history, Google Drive, Time Machine, Snowtrack, the v1/v2/FINAL file-naming chaos, and manual email/USB backups? Pick the tool you're already wrestling with and see what Keeply does differently.

hero.sub: How does Keeply stack up against tools you already use for managing project files?
hero.sub2: Pick the one you're currently wrestling with — we'll show you what Keeply does differently.

cta.what_is_body: A Windows and macOS desktop app that quietly tracks every save of your project files — Blender, PSD, Office docs, PDFs, images. No Git knowledge required; no per-seat licensing. Your files stay on your NAS (or local disk) — Keeply just handles the version history.

meta.title: Keeply 工具比較 — Dropbox、Time Machine、Snowtrack 等替代方案
meta.description: Keeply 跟 Dropbox 版本歷史、Google Drive、Time Machine、Snowtrack、v1/v2/FINAL 檔名混亂、email/USB 手動備份怎麼比？挑一個你正在用的工具，直接看 Keeply 做了什麼不同。

hero.h1_html: Keeply 跟其他工具怎麼比？
hero.sub: 你現在管專案檔案的方式，Keeply 能幫你省掉什麼？
hero.sub2: 挑一個你正在用、但有點煩的工具——下面直接告訴你 Keeply 做了什麼不同。

cta.what_is_body: 一款 Windows 與 macOS 桌面應用程式，默默記錄你每一次存檔——Blender、PSD、Office 文件、PDF、圖片通通可以。不需要學 Git、不按人頭收費。你的檔案照樣留在 NAS（或本機磁碟），Keeply 只負責管版本歷史。

en.title: vs the "v1/v2/FINAL" chaos
en.hook_html: Stop renaming files cover_FINAL_real_v3.psd — let the tool track versions for you.

zh-TW.title: vs「v1/v2/FINAL」檔名混亂
zh-TW.hook_html: 不用再取 封面_FINAL_真的最終版_v3.psd——讓工具幫你記住每一版。

en.title: vs Dropbox version history
en.hook_html: Dropbox's version history caps at 30 days. Keeply keeps every save forever — no subscription escalation.

zh-TW.title: vs Dropbox 版本歷史
zh-TW.hook_html: Dropbox 版本歷史只留 30 天，之後就消失。Keeply 每次儲存都永久保留，不用年年升級方案。

en.title: vs Google Drive
en.hook_html: Drive has version history buried under File → Version history. Keeply makes it the primary interface.

zh-TW.title: vs Google Drive
zh-TW.hook_html: Google Drive 的版本歷史藏在「檔案 → 版本記錄」選單裡。Keeply 把版本管理直接做成主介面。

en.title: vs Time Machine
en.hook_html: macOS-only, OS-level backup, no per-project view. Keeply works on Windows too and tracks meaningful changes.

zh-TW.title: vs Time Machine
zh-TW.hook_html: macOS 限定、作業系統層級備份、看不到單一專案的變動。Keeply 跨 Windows + macOS，記錄有意義的每次改動。

en.title: vs Snowtrack (now P4 One)
en.hook_html: Perforce acquired Snowtrack in March 2025 and moved it to enterprise pricing. Keeply picks up where it left off.

zh-TW.title: vs Snowtrack（現已成 P4 One）
zh-TW.hook_html: Perforce 在 2025 年 3 月收購了 Snowtrack，改名 P4 One 並改為企業訂閱。Keeply 接手獨立創作者的需求。

en.title: vs Email & USB backup
en.hook_html: Emailing yourself files or copying to a USB every Friday — Keeply automates what you're already trying to do.

zh-TW.title: vs Email 寄自己 / USB 備份
zh-TW.hook_html: 每週五把檔案寄給自己、複製到隨身碟——Keeply 自動做你現在手動做的事，還不容易忘。
